allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Planet Planner Phase 1 & 2

Phase 1 - Project Foundation & Canvas Core:
- Vite + React + TypeScript setup
- Pixi.js canvas engine with pan/zoom
- Camera system with smooth animations
- Grid rendering (square/hex) with subdivisions
- Input handling (mouse/touch)
- Zustand state management
- Type definitions for all systems
- Utility functions (math, color)

Phase 2 - Layer System & Rendering Pipeline:
- Layer management with Pixi.js integration
- Procedural parchment texture generation
- Perlin noise implementation
- Render pipeline with blend modes
- Viewport culling for performance
- Layer Panel UI with CRUD operations
- Toolbar with zoom and grid controls
- Status bar with viewport info
- Export to PNG/JPEG functionality

Features:
- Pan with middle mouse or Shift+drag
- Zoom with scroll wheel
- Toggle grid visibility
- Add/remove layers
- Layer visibility and lock controls
- Parchment overlay effect
- Responsive layout

🤖 Generated with Claude Code (https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
